                                         +-------+
                                      +--+  Top  |
+----------+          +----------+    |  +-------+
|  Bottom  |<--+------+  Center  |<---+
+----------+   |      +----------+    | +--------+
               |                      +-+  Left  |
 +---------+   |                        +--------+
 |  Right  |<--+
 +---------+
